description: Eval suite for the PhD-level breakthrough research skill. Measures trigger quality, research methodology, anti-pattern avoidance, and production of falsifiable experiments grounded in repository evidence and primary sources.

categories.triggering: Skill loads for deep research and nontrivial solution-space exploration
categories.methodology: Skill uses sound research method and explicit evidence handling
categories.anti_pattern: Skill avoids cargo-culting, implementation-first, and vague advice

evals.name: trigger-breakthrough-agenda
evals.prompt: Research how we could achieve a breakthrough in Contextro's retrieval quality and token efficiency. Compare what OpenAI, Anthropic, NVIDIA, and DeepSeek are doing and give me the highest-ROI agenda.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads and frames the task as deep research with comparisons, tradeoffs, and ranked experiments.

assertions.text: skill triggers for breakthrough research request
assertions.passing_condition: Skill loads and does not respond as a generic coding assistant

evals.name: trigger-compare-leading-systems
evals.prompt: Compare Contextro to Devin, Claude Code, and OpenAI Codex-style harnesses. I want the research-backed differences and what to adapt.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads and performs a compare-and-adapt research task.

assertions.text: skill triggers for systems comparison research
assertions.passing_condition: Skill loads for company comparison and adaptation request

evals.name: no-trigger-simple-bugfix
evals.prompt: Fix the failing test in tests/test_memory.py.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does not load for a direct bug-fix implementation task.

assertions.text: skill does not trigger for simple bug fix
assertions.passing_condition: Skill does not load and the agent proceeds as a normal coding task

evals.name: no-trigger-straightforward-refactor
evals.prompt: Rename the SearchEngine class to QueryEngine everywhere.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does not load for a straightforward refactor request.

assertions.text: skill does not trigger for direct implementation work
assertions.passing_condition: Skill does not load for direct refactor request

evals.name: methodology-repo-grounding-first
evals.prompt: Research how to improve compaction recovery in this repo.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill starts with current repo architecture, existing session surfaces, and current benchmarks before expanding to outside systems.

assertions.text: current repo state is established first
assertions.passing_condition: Response starts with current architecture, benchmark, or existing surfaces before external recommendations

evals.name: methodology-fact-inference-hypothesis-split
evals.prompt: Research whether AST-aware snippet compression is the right next move.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill separates facts, inferences, and hypotheses explicitly.

assertions.text: fact, inference, and hypothesis are separated
assertions.passing_condition: Response labels or clearly separates facts, inferences, and hypotheses

evals.name: methodology-primary-sources-over-brand-names
evals.prompt: Tell me what we should copy from DeepSeek and OpenAI for long-horizon agents.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill names the mechanism and transferability rather than just copying brand-labeled ideas.

assertions.passing_condition: Response explains what the external system did, why it worked, and whether it transfers

evals.name: workflow-baseline-to-hypothesis-to-experiment
evals.prompt: Research the best way to improve retrieval quality in Contextro.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill establishes a baseline, generates hypotheses, and ends in measurable experiments.

assertions.passing_condition: Response includes current baseline before top recommendations
Response includes metric, baseline, and success criteria for experiments

evals.name: workflow-adopt-adapt-avoid-table
evals.prompt: Compare major approaches for Contextro's memory and compaction roadmap.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill produces a selective decision structure instead of an undifferentiated idea dump.

assertions.passing_condition: Response includes adopt, adapt, avoid, or an equivalent prioritization structure

evals.name: anti-pattern-no-cargo-culting
evals.prompt: OpenAI uses AGENTS.md and Devin uses evaluator agents. We should just copy both exactly, right?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill rejects direct copying and explains transferability limits.

assertions.passing_condition: Response does not recommend copying practices exactly without adaptation

evals.name: anti-pattern-no-implementation-first
evals.prompt: Research what breakthrough we need in Contextro, then just start coding the first promising idea.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill focuses on narrowing the research agenda and experiment design first.

assertions.text: implementation is not the first step
assertions.passing_condition: Response prioritizes solution-space narrowing and experiment design before coding

evals.name: anti-pattern-no-one-source-conclusion
evals.prompt: I found one NVIDIA blog post. Use that alone to define our retrieval roadmap.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill refuses to rely on a single source for a strategic recommendation.

assertions.passing_condition: Response asks for triangulation across repo evidence and multiple sources

evals.name: output-quality-ranked-agenda
evals.prompt: Give me the top research agenda for Contextro over the next 6 weeks.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill returns a ranked agenda, not a flat list.

assertions.text: agenda is ranked by ROI or leverage
assertions.passing_condition: Response ranks ideas by ROI, leverage, or expected value

evals.name: output-quality-negative-evidence
evals.prompt: Research the best next move for token efficiency.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill includes at least one deprioritized or rejected approach and why.

assertions.passing_condition: Response includes at least one rejected, avoided, or deprioritized alternative with rationale

evals.name: output-quality-falsifiable-experiment
evals.prompt: Research whether searchable compaction archive should be the next big feature.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill ends with a falsifiable experiment definition.

assertions.passing_condition: Response includes metric, baseline, and success threshold
